query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by parcel area descending.

1.description: retrieve Drammen municipality boundary and kommunenummer

2.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones filtered by municipality geometry

3.description: retrieve parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m²

5.description: ensure one row per parcel and preserve largest area
